The '''''Spirit of Jabba''''' was a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] hidden by [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] inside [[Glass Mountain]] and watched over by [[Onoh]]. It contained many treasures, including eight [[Mendacian funeral urn]]s. It was discovered by [[Gorga Desilijic Aarrpo/Legends|Gorga Desilijic Aarrpo]] after Jabba's death, but was hijacked by [[Gizman|Big Gizz]] and [[Spiker]]. They soon discovered the [[Jabba Tape]], an automated computer defense program that nearly killed them before Onoh entered the proper authorization code. The ship was shot down by the ''[[Nemphas]]'' in the desert beyond [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]].
